description:
The 'TailwindTraders' project has a development build pipeline ('TailwindTraders-Dev-CI') that builds the application in debug mode on every commit. You need to establish a parallel production pipeline. Create a new build pipeline named 'TailwindTraders-Prod' by cloning the existing 'TailwindTraders-Dev-CI' pipeline. Configure the new pipeline to build in 'release' mode by setting the 'buildConfiguration' variable to 'release' and disable the Continuous Integration (CI) trigger so it only runs manually.

Credentials:
